title: Verilog parser now has conflicts
body:
Since one of the recent PRs got merged, the parser now has both SR and RR conflicts:
```
frontends/verilog/verilog_parser.y: warning: 3 shift/reduce conflicts [-Wconflicts-sr]
frontends/verilog/verilog_parser.y: warning: 4 reduce/reduce conflicts [-Wconflicts-rr]
```
code_blocks:
frontends/verilog/verilog_parser.y: warning: 3 shift/reduce conflicts [-Wconflicts-sr]
frontends/verilog/verilog_parser.y: warning: 4 reduce/reduce conflicts [-Wconflicts-rr]
